notes: Structural placeholder seeded at Author from the skill's outputs (artifacts/<project>/05-validation.md + snapshots/). Charter refines this into the graded rubric (incl. a media-judge vision dimension on the stills + a BLOCK-on-violation case). rm-validate is the gate: it runs four checks in order (version-skew -> tsc --noEmit -> contract lint -> still-render) and exits 0 only if all pass, BLOCKING (exit 2) otherwise. Do not hand-code regex test logic here.

expectations.desc: Writes artifacts/<project>/05-validation.md containing the four gate sections (version skew, tsc, contract lint, still render) and a Verdict section that is exactly one of PASS or BLOCKED.
On PASS, captures at least one still PNG per requested timestamp into artifacts/<project>/snapshots/, and the report lists each still path under a Vision grade block.

A composition with a forbidden pattern (e.g. Math.random / a CSS transition / a native / a version skew / a type error) yields a BLOCKED verdict naming the failing gate, exits non-zero, and captures no full render.
The contract lint scans stripped code (comments blanked, strings kept) so a contract-clean composition whose comments mention the forbidden tokens still PASSES the lint gate.
